title: Default Revamped
description: A texture pack made to revamp the textures
body: This pack changes the look of Blocks, Items, Tools, Hud and Armor to Revamp on the Vanilla Textures. These are some of the Textures that have been Revamped. I tried adding some shadows and some Textures that weren't symetrycal now are.(https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13954642bf9b8f2c433f8368301b68b10268d705.png)This is still in beta but my plan is to Revamp most if not all the textures in the game!
